Terra Quantum AG was established in 2019 by its two founding members, CEO Markus Pflitsch and Prof. Dr. Karl Eckstein, who acts as CLO.

Professor Gordey Lesovik, CTO of Terra Quantum AG and Head of the Quantum Information Laboratory of MIPT, had this to say about the startup's intentions: 'We plan to implement a useful quantum algorithm on the IBM machine with 20 Qubits in order to test Quantum Supremacy.

With a world-class, international team on board with scientific skills in applied mathematics, physics, chemistry, chemical physics, mechanical engineering, systems programming, electronics, and physics engineering, combined with the abilities of CEO Markus Pflitsch, whose expertise spans both the scientific and the business worlds, the startup is on the right path to achieving success.
